ast.name: info
ast.source: Audio Notes: getUserMedia() success, stream created, initializing MediaRecorder
ast.target: 音频笔记：getUserMedia() 成功，已创建流，正在初始化 MediaRecorder

ast.name: info
ast.source: Audio Notes: Folder exists. Skipping creation.
ast.target: 音频笔记：文件夹已存在，跳过创建。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Audio Notes: Obsidian Audio Notes loaded
ast.target: 音频笔记：Obsidian Audio Notes 已加载

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 加入队列

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 使用 Deepgram 转写

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The .mp3 must be publicly available, so it cannot require a login or other authentication to access. The .mp3 file cannot be on your computer, it must be online.
ast.target: .mp3 必须公开可访问，因此不能要求登录或其他身份验证。该 .mp3 文件不能在你的电脑上，必须在线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of time to add from the current time when creating new audio notes
ast.target: 创建新的音频笔记时从当前时间增加的时长

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of time to subtract from the current time when creating new audio notes
ast.target: 创建新的音频笔记时从当前时间减去的时长

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of time to skip backward when pressing the backward button on the audio player
ast.target: 在音频播放器上按下后退按钮时向后跳过的时长

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of time to skip forward when pressing the forward button on the audio player
ast.target: 在音频播放器上按下前进按钮时向前跳过的时长

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Provided by the library maintainer to work with transcripts online. Go to github.com/jjmaldonis/obsidian-audio-notes for info about how to join the early beta.
ast.target: 由库维护者提供以便在线使用转录。前往 github.com/jjmaldonis/obsidian-audio-notes 获取如何加入早期内测的信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on to log console messages to log.txt in the plugin folder (requires restart).
ast.target: 开启后将控制台消息记录到插件文件夹中的 log.txt（需要重启）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visit https://dpgr.am/obsidian to get your free API key.
ast.target: 访问 https://dpgr.am/obsidian 获取你的免费 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder your transcripts will be saved in when transcribing audio files.
ast.target: 转录音频文件时保存转录文本的文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: .mp3 文件的 URL：

ast.name: setName
ast.target: + 生成新笔记时的时长（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: - 生成新笔记时的时长（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 向后跳过（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 向前跳过（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 音频笔记 API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 调试模式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Deepgram API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Deepgram 转录文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: or select an mp3 file from your vault using the dropdown below:
ast.target: 或使用下方下拉菜单从你的库中选择一个 mp3 文件：

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: <your api key>

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 在此输入你的 API 密钥...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Audio Notes: The user's cursor is not inside an audio note
ast.target: 音频笔记：用户的光标不在音频笔记内

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Audio Notes: The user tried to generate an audio note with an existing quote
ast.target: 音频笔记：用户尝试使用已有引用生成音频笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Transcript file does not have start or end times for at least one text entry.
ast.target: 转录文件中至少有一个文本条目缺少开始或结束时间。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已成功将 .mp3 文件加入转录队列

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Make sure your URL is an .mp3, .m4b, or .m4a file. It should end in one of those extensions (excluding everything after an optional question mark).
ast.target: 请确保你的 URL 是 .mp3、.m4b 或 .m4a 文件。它应以这些扩展名之一结尾（不包括可选问号后的所有内容）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please specify a .mp3 URL, an accuracy level, and a language.
ast.target: 请指定一个 .mp3 URL、准确度级别和语言。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用 Deepgram 转录音频...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 转录文件名已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 必须是数字

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No audio file defined for audio note.
ast.target: 未为音频笔记定义音频文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An audio note has a start time that is after the end time. Fix it!
ast.target: 某条音频笔记的开始时间在结束时间之后。请修正！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your Deepgram API key in the settings tab.
ast.target: 请在设置选项卡中设置你的 Deepgram API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Coud not create audio note at end of file.
ast.target: 无法在文件末尾创建音频笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到音频笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Currently, only YouTube videos are supported.
ast.target: 目前仅支持 YouTube 视频。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please focus your cursor on a markdown window.
ast.target: 请将光标聚焦在 Markdown 窗口中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Use the command `Media Extended: Open Media from Link` to open a YouTube video.
ast.target: 使用命令 `Media Extended: Open Media from Link` 来打开 YouTube 视频。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法生成音频笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已创建新的音频笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重新生成所有音频笔记...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No transcript file defined for audio note.
ast.target: 未为音频笔记定义转录文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 音频笔记生成完成！

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重新生成当前音频笔记...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please place your cursor inside the Audio Note you want to generate
ast.target: 请将光标放在你要生成的音频笔记内

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please delete the quote for the audio note before regenerating it
ast.target: 请在重新生成之前删除该音频笔记的引用

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you do not have an API key, contact the maintainer of this plugin. See the README at https://github.com/jjmaldonis/obsidian-audio-notes for more information.
ast.target: 如果你没有 API 密钥，请联系此插件的维护者。更多信息请参阅 https://github.com/jjmaldonis/obsidian-audio-notes 的 README。
